---
title: "Timeline of Hurricanes"
author: "Connor Whalen"
date: "2025-07-20"
output:
  word_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: '3'
  html_document:
    theme: readable
    highlight: textmate
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

Load packages
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(ghibli)
library(tidyverse)
```

Set plot aesthetics
```{r}
# color palette -- hurricane = #CB87B4, control = #F4B95A, drought = #D84D16, flood = #1BB6AF
# trem = #c9ad79 , meta = #F66387 , mono = #A6E000 , myxo = #07c4c5
connor_theme <- theme(legend.position = "top", 
        legend.title = element_text(size = 18),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = "white"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "lines"),
        panel.spacing.y = unit(0, "lines"),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 8, color = "grey30"),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size = 0.2, color = "darkgrey"))
```

Load dataframe
```{r}
# actual values
df <- read.csv("~/Desktop/UW/Chapter1 NOLA/datasets/nola misc analysis - timeline dates.csv") %>% 
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  mutate(start_date = as.Date(start_date)) %>%
  mutate(end_date = as.Date(end_date)) %>% 
  select(start_date, end_date, type, name) %>% 
   mutate(
    name = factor(name,
      levels = c("control", 
                 unique(name[name != "control"][order(start_date[name != "control"])])))) %>%
  mutate(
    start_date = case_when(
      type == "pre" ~ start_date, 
      type == "post" ~ NA_Date_, 
      TRUE ~ start_date
    ),
    end_date = case_when(
      type == "pre" ~ NA_Date_,  
      type == "post" ~ end_date, 
      TRUE ~ end_date
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(type = factor(type)) %>%
  group_by(name, type) %>%
  summarise(
    min_start = min(start_date, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_end = max(end_date, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    name = factor(name, levels = unique(name)),  # keep name order
    type_offset = case_when(
      type == "6 month" ~ -0.2,
      type == "3 month" ~ 0.2,
      type == "hurricane" ~ 0,
      type == "tropical storm" ~ 0  # you can adjust this if needed
    ),
    y_pos = as.numeric(name) + type_offset
  )

control_df <- df %>% 
  filter(str_detect(name, regex("control", ignore_case = TRUE))) %>% 
  mutate(type = factor(type),
         y_pos = as.numeric(type))

event_df <- df %>% 
  filter(!str_detect(name, regex("control", ignore_case = TRUE)))

```

Make timeline.
```{r}

ggplot(control_df, 
       aes(x = min_start, xend = max_end, y = y_pos, yend = y_pos, color = type)) +
  geom_segment(size = 3, alpha = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = sort(unique(control_df$y_pos)),
    labels = levels(control_df$type),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.1))
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "hurricane" = "#CB87B4",
    "tropical storm" = "#8487d1",
    "6 month" = "#e2733a",
    "3 month" = "#85b689"
  )) +
  labs(title = "Timeline of Control Periods by Type",
       x = "Date",
       y = NULL) +
  connor_theme


ggplot(event_df, 
       aes(x = min_start, xend = max_end, y = y_pos, yend = y_pos, color = type)) +
  geom_segment(size = 3, alpha = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq_along(levels(df$name)),
    labels = levels(df$name),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.05))
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "hurricane" = "#CB87B4",
    "tropical storm" = "#8487d1",
    "6 month" = "#e2733a",
    "3 month" = "#85b689"
  )) +
  labs(title = "Timeline of Event Types",
       x = "Date",
       y = "Event Type") +
  connor_theme

```
